case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION,$1,960 US CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HODDINOTT, ANNIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $1,470.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY KAREN HILL ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT ANNIE HODDINOTT. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION $490.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DEPOSIT IS DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION,$1,960 US CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100,INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
